name: 46elks
description: Swedish SMS, voice, and MMS API platform operating its own Uppsala-based infrastructure with developer-first design.

seo.title: 46elks — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: 46elks: Swedish SMS, voice, and MMS API platform operating its own Uppsala-based infrastructure with developer-first design.

when_to_use: OTP SMS verification for Nordic e-commerce checkout
Voice IVR for Swedish customer support line
Two-way SMS for real-time delivery status updates
MMS product alerts with image previews for promotions
A2P bulk SMS campaigns with delivery receipts

pros: Own Uppsala infra, no third-party carrier dependency
Simple REST API with solid Nordic coverage
cons: Limited scale outside Nordics and Europe
No WhatsApp or RCS channels available
Smaller SDK ecosystem than Twilio or Sinch
Docs lean on examples, thin on edge cases
review.verdict: Reliable Nordic SMS/voice API for teams who value Swedish-hosted infra over global channel breadth.
review.best_for: Nordic and EU apps needing dependable SMS/voice with GDPR-friendly hosting
review.not_for: Global senders needing WhatsApp, RCS, or deep APAC/US carrier reach

lock_in.reason: Standard messaging APIs so switching to competitors is feasible

transparency.reason: Fully public per-message pricing, no-contract model

developer_experience.reason: Clean REST API, code samples in many languages, friendly docs
